unknown_value_policy: unknown means not verified from repository evidence; it never grants permission or asserts that data are non-sensitive

source.name: World Bank, Atlas of Global Development 2026 (data360.worldbank.org/en/atlas)
source.version: Atlas 2026 edition (upstream repo has no tags; commit-level version unknown)

license.identifier: CC-BY-3.0-IGO (Atlas of Global Development 2026, publication level)
license.evidence: data360.worldbank.org/en/atlas declares 'License: Creative Commons Attribution CC BY 3.0 IGO' with citation Pirlea et al. 2026 (verified 2026-07-21); the worldbank/atlas-global-development GitHub repo carries no LICENSE file, so the anchor is the publisher's site. Per-graphic provider terms follow each chapter config.json source field and are individually unverified unless noted.

collections.notes: Collection-level record; individual embedded datasets may have different providers and terms.

source.name: Mixed sources, including H3, OpenStreetMap-attributed grid data, and runtime map services
source.version: unknown

license.identifier: mixed: h3-js Apache-2.0; Africa grid GeoJSON CC-BY-4.0; Space2Stats data terms unverified
license.evidence: h3-js vendored with Uber Apache-2.0 notices (library/nightlights-hexmap/vendor-h3/h3-js.js). Africa grid GeoJSONs match the WB 'Africa Electricity Transmission and Distribution Grid Map' (per-feature source fields: Umeme, NamPower, World Bank Group, OSM, REA, AICD, ECREEE); energydata.info dataset page declares CC BY 4.0 (verified 2026-07-21) — OSM-attributed features may carry ODbL obligations. Space2Stats H3 data fetched from space2stats.ds.io; its data license is unverified (the repo LICENSE covers the software). Mapbox/CARTO basemaps are runtime services under their own ToS, not redistributed.

collections.storage_rationale: Maintainer-reviewed legacy assets: the two pre-existing Africa grid GeoJSON files are retained so the nightlights demo works offline. They remain below 50 MiB; migration to external versioned storage requires a separately tested change and no history rewrite is authorized here.
collections.notes: Existing GeoJSON blobs over 25 MiB are retained without history rewriting; see docs/STORAGE_POLICY.md.
